description_long: This helmet features a robust, futuristic design with a predominantly tan and white color scheme accented by black and subtle teal highlights. The front displays a circular central element surrounded by a tan frame, flanked by two large, curved side panels with circular cutouts, likely for both style and aerodynamics. The top of the helmet is smooth with a few small vent-like slits, while the sides show black, ribbed components that may serve as additional ventilation or padding. The rear is reinforced with a broad, dark vertical band and a lower extension, possibly for added protection or mounting accessories. The overall shape is rounded and compact, suggesting a focus on both safety and comfort. The helmet appears to be constructed from hard plastic with some rubberized or foam elements for impact absorption.
description: A futuristic, tan and white helmet with curved side panels, a circular front element, and black ribbed accents, designed for safety and comfort.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a broad, dark vertical band and lower extension, with tan side panels visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved tan panel with circular cutouts and black ribbed component on top.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the circular central element, tan frame, and symmetrical side panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with curved tan panel and black ribbed component.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Three small horizontal slits on the top center, with additional vent-like black ribbed components on each side near the top.
